title: stelis morae
intro: Stelis morae, also known as the "Tree of Life," is a type of orchid native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Stelis morae include its ability to aid in the treatment of various ailments, such as fever, sore throats, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Stelis morae can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in combination with other herbs to enhance their medicinal properties.
